    $HEHE TOKEN

    THE PEOPLE'S MEME PIKACHU - $HEHE : The electrifying meme token that's shocking the crypto world! ⚡🚀 Just like Pikachu's Thunderbolt, this token's meme power is off the charts. Prepare for a journey to Meme Land as we take $HEHE on a rocket ride to the moon and beyond. Value? Measured in laughs per minute! Join the meme revolution; in this crypto universe, even Pikachu would crack a smile. 🌌😂 #PikachuHEHEPower

    How to buy
    $HEHE
    Token
    Take charge and buy $HEHE tokens in presale using ETH, BNB, USDT, or a bank card before it lists on DEX.

    1

    Send ETH or BNB to your wallet and ape in using your preferred chain. Use the presale widget above to swap for $HEHE.

    2

    You can also buy $HEHE tokens with USDT (ERC-20 or BEP-20). Use the USDT option and swap your desired amount.

    3

    Prefer plastic? No problem. Have your own crypto wallet address on hand and order $HEHE tokens using your bank card.

    More info

    ROADMAP

    We're laying the foundation and empowering our community every step of the way. Together, we'll show the world that THE PEOPLE'S MEME PIKACHU - $HEHE TOKEN is here to stay.

    phase 1

    FOUNDATION

    🚀 Smart Contract Development: Secure and audited smart contract for $HEHE token to ensure transparency and trust.

    🌐 Community Building: Telegram, Discord, Twitter - Get ready for the hype train with a strong and engaged Pikachu community.

    📣 Branding and Marketing: Spread the word about The People's Monster Meme Coin with a comprehensive marketing campaign. Let's go viral!

    phase 2

    LAUNCH

    🚀 Token Launch: The People's Monster Meme Pikachu ($HEHE) token officially takes off. Get ready for liftoff!

    🤝 Partnerships: Collaborate with meme creators, influencers, and content platforms. Let's join forces and spread THE PEOPLE'S Memes movement!

    💰 Token Listings: Launch $HEHE token on popular DEXs with ample liquidity and accessibility. Trade with ease.

    💎 Exchange Listings: Level up our trading game with listings on established CEXs. Reach more people.

    🌍 Awareness Campaigns: Take Pikachu Memes revolution mainstream. Media, influencers, and popular platforms, we're coming for you!

    phase 3

    COMMUNITY EMPOWERMENT

    🔒 Gated Community: Unlock exclusive benefits in the PIKA gated community. Early updates, exclusive content, and interactive experiences await you!

    🌟 Market Cap Goal: Aim high, aim for $5 billion market capitalization. Let's show the world the true power of THE PEOPLE'S Memes!

    🚀 Tier 1 CEX Listings: Get listed on top-tier CEXs. Boost liquidity, accessibility, and reach for THE PEOPLE'S Memes warriors!

    TOKENOMICS

    Total Supply: 187,666,000,000,000

    Liquidity Pool : 61%
    Treasury / DAO: 27.5%

    Airdrop: 1%

    The launch of the $HEHE token will help sustain the growth of the Pikachu Memes community and reward loyal members.

    the HEHE

    Ecosystem

    Decentralized governance

    A community of HEHE token holders govern the HEHE ecosystem, the smart contracts that power HEHE.

    Learn more

    DeFi Yield Protocol

    We are driven by a robust foundation, committed to creating a potent decentralized ecosystem that embraces the challenges of the future. Our current array of products and services, such as yield farming and staking, is just the beginning. We continuously push the boundaries, introducing cutting-edge DeFi solutions, educational tools, NFTs, and even Metaverse gaming, ensuring accessibility for users of all levels, from novices to experts. Our aim is to evolve and grow with the ever-changing landscape of decentralized finance, providing a comprehensive platform for all your needs.

    Learn more

    $HEHE

    Token

    $HEHE utility token is the energy that flows through the whole HEHE ecosystem! Use it to command every major aspect of the Monster World.

    Monster GO

    Join Trainers around the world and play Monster GO together in new and exciting ways.

    Learn more

    Monster Universe

    The Monster World is the primary realm for monsters, set within its own unique universe. While drawing inspiration from the real world, the Monster World exhibits distinct characteristics that differentiate it from our own reality, it offers a fascinating environment where monsters roam and captivating adventures unfold. Embrace the wonders of the Monster World, a realm that sparks imagination and takes you on extraordinary journeys beyond your wildest imagination.

    Learn more

    AMBASSADOR & CEO

    not just a memecoin

    HEHE

    ECOSYSTEM UTILITY

    $HEHE token is your gateway to Monster World which will power all of the future projects in the Metaverse. Don't miss out on special bonuses for early adopters!

    STAKING

    Use $HEHE to raise the stakes! Literally. Get a juicy staking percent boost and access to special items with HEHE token.

    Instant Rewards

    HEHE token holders are entitled to share a 0.05% fee from each trade made on HEHE ECOSYSTEM. Once tokens are staked, users will receive $HEHE tokens, representing their stake in the Staking pool. These $HEHE tokens grow in value over time, in proportion to a user's share of the fees gathered.

    GOVERNED BY THE COMMUNITY.

    The HEHE ecosystem is managed by a global community of $HEHE token holders and delegates.

    Multi-chain

    The HEHE token is available on more than one blockchain. Each blockchain HEHE is on has its own strong points that allows the HEHE ecosystem to thrive on it.

    $336,660
    $HEHE AIRDROP

    We're giving away $336,660 worth of $HEHE tokens split between 666 lucky degens in a very generous $HEHE airdrop. Enter below and make sure you're in it to win it!

    FAQ

    Common answers to questions about Pikachu can be found below.

    What is MEME PIKACHU - $HEHE TOKEN?

    THE PEOPLE'S MEME PIKACHU - $HEHE : The electrifying meme token that's shocking the crypto world! ⚡🚀 Just like Pikachu's Thunderbolt, this token's meme power is off the charts. Prepare for a journey to Meme Land as we take $HEHE on a rocket ride to the moon and beyond. Value? Measured in laughs per minute! Join the meme revolution; in this crypto universe, even Pikachu would crack a smile. 🌌😂 #PikachuHEHEPower

    Why the $HEHE token?

    🚀 Step into the electrifying world of $HEHE - Token! --> 🌟 One of the crypto's mightiest communities with buzzing social engagement! 💥 Join the movement, get rewarded, and be legitimized as a true supporter! 🏆💪 Don't miss out on the exhilarating journey! Catch the lightning of $HEHE now! ⚡🔥

    When is the claim and launch of $HEHE?

    The claim period will start after the conclusion of the presale. The specific date and time to claim as well as the launch details will be announced on our website and official social media platforms in due course.

    How do I claim my $HEHE tokens?

    Claiming will be live on the hehe.to website using the same wallet you used to contribute.

    How do I contact support?

    Get in touch with us at contact@hehe.to or join our Discord community, scroll down to the Help channel, and create a support ticket. in touch?

    contact

    $HEHE is a meme cryptocurrency devoid of any inherent worth or prospects for financial gain. It lacks an official team or established plan, serving solely as a frivolous form of amusement.
